creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->open

- The runtime path problem has been fixed by this commit: 
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-ports/2009-July/176094.html 
- The compilation problem should already have been fixed at the time 
of the port update to 5.0r14.  Doesn't the command starting at line 64 
of the port's Makefile fix the problem for you? 
- I will investigate further the scheme problem. 

Thanks.
